summary: A large language model (LLM) plugin for Neovim, provides commands to interact with LLM (like ChatGPT, Copilot, ChatGLM, kimi, deepseek, openrouter and local llms). Support Github models.

title: parthalon025/ollama-queue
summary: Priority job queue and scheduler for local Ollama LLM inference — smart scheduling, DLQ, A/B eval pipeline, web dashboard.

title: Moditeam89/WeChat-tweets-counterattacker
summary: Generate AI-powered rebuttal articles in a familiar style to counter pseudoscience and overselling content in WeChat family groups.

title: moheladwy/ExpertBridge
summary: A professional networking platform that connects users with experts and technicians. Features include personalized feeds, job hiring, chat, AI-powered content moderation, and a dual-role reputation system. (normalization)

title: wesleyscholl/squish
summary: 🤖🗜️⚡️ Compress local LLMs once, run them forever at sub-second load times. OpenAI + Ollama drop-in for Apple Silicon — statistically identical accuracy, 54× faster cold starts.

title: elophanto/EloPhanto
summary: Open-source AI agent that builds zero-human businesses, grows audiences, ships code, all autonomously.

title: backplane/open-webui-mirror
summary: Automated (unofficial) Docker Hub mirror of tagged images on open-webui's GHCR repo
